hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
restaurant_cost=0
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity) in ['breakfast', 'lunch', 'dinner']: restaurant_cost+=activity_cost(activity)
result=restaurant_cost<=800
result_list.append(result)
result=False
intercity_transport_go=''
intercity_transport_back=''
if allactivities(plan)[0]['type'] == "train" and intercity_transport_origin(allactivities(plan)[0])==start_city(plan) and allactivities(plan)[-1]['type'] == "train" and intercity_transport_origin(allactivities(plan)[-1])==target_city(plan):
  result=True
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language: We are 2 people traveling from Shanghai to Nanjing for 3 days. The requirements must meet any one of the following: 1. The meal budget is 800.0 2. We want to take a train to the destination and take a train back.
